latest_release.name: Version 2.8.6
latest_release.body:
- Fix: `wp menu item update --position` does not reshuffle other menu items [[#603](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/603)]
- Document that `--network` excludes `roles` from `wp user list` output [[#597](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/597)]
- Strip HTML tags from multisite user signup validation errors [[#596](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/596)]
- Add `--site-path` filter to `wp site list` to avoid conflict with global `--path` [[#595](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/595)]
- Add `wp menu item add-post-type-archive` subcommand [[#594](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/594)]
- Add `wp term prune` command to remove terms with 0 or 1 published posts [[#586](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/586)]
- Fix: allow `wp post delete` to trash custom post types [[#583](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/583)]
- Add common options reference to `wp option` documentation [[#581](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/581)]
- Improve `wp user remove-role` docs and output when no role argument is given [[#580](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/580)]
- Add --site-url parameter for custom domain configuration in site create [[#576](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/576)]
- Remove duplicate date parsing in Post_Command.php [[#575](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/575)]
- Regenerate README file [[#574](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/574)]
- Fix tests against WordPress trunk [[#573](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/573)]
- Regenerate README file [[#572](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/572)]
- Implement wp site get command to enable site operations by URL [[#571](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/571)]
- Add `wp menu item get` command [[#570](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/570)]
- Add term_group as optionally available field in wp term list [[#569](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/569)]
- Add font library commands for WordPress 6.5+ [[#567](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/567)]
- Add wp post revision restore, diff, and prune commands [[#563](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/563)]
- Update the README.md file [[#558](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/558)]
- Add block-related post commands [[#556](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/556)]
- PHPStan fixes [[#553](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/553)]
- Add notes support documentation and tests for WordPress 6.9+ [[#552](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/552)]
- Don't require --force flag for deleting already trashed posts [[#548](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/548)]
- `wp post create`: Add JSON input support for `tax_input` [[#532](https://github.com/wp-cli/entity-command/pull/532)]
